docs:
# Password Input
Password field with show/hide visibility toggle.
## Import
```tsx
import { PasswordInput } from "@/components/ui/password-input";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<PasswordInput placeholder="Enter password" maxSizeMb={undefined} size={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **placeholder** (string) — default: `"Enter password"`: Placeholder
- **maxSizeMb** (number): Max size (MB)
- **size** (string): Size
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add password-input
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/password-input
```
